title: pilosella cymosa subsp. regelii
intro: Pilosella cymosa subsp. regelii, also known as a rare and lesser-known species of the Pilosella cymosa plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pilosella cymosa subsp. regelii include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
